O

onAdd(Container.Entry) - Method in class microui.layout.ColumnLayout
Called when a new entry is added to the container.
onAdd(Container.Entry) - Method in class microui.layout.GridLayout
Called when a new entry is added to the container.
onAdd(Container.Entry) - Method in class microui.layout.LayoutManager
Called when a new entry is added to the container.
onAdd(Container.Entry) - Method in class microui.layout.LinearLayout
Called when a new entry is added to the container.
onAdd(Container.Entry) - Method in class microui.layout.RowLayout
Called when a new entry is added to the container.
onClick(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for click events (press + release combination).
onDoubleClick(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for double-click events (two rapid clicks).
onDragEnd(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for drag end events (end of drag operation).
onDragging(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for dragging events (continuous during drag).
onDragStart(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for drag start events (beginning of drag operation).
onDraw(PGraphics) - Method in class microui.core.GraphicsBuffer
Optional override method for custom drawing directly to the graphics buffer.
onEnter(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for mouse enter events (mouse enters component bounds).
onEnterLong(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for long enter events (extended hover).
onHover(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for hover events (mouse over component).
onLeave(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for mouse leave events (mouse leaves component bounds).
onLeaveLong(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for long leave events (mouse leaves after long hover).
onLongPress(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for long press events (extended mouse button hold).
ONLY_DIGITS - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController.ValidationMode
Allow only digit characters (0-9).
ONLY_LETTERS - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController.ValidationMode
Allow only letter characters (a-z, A-Z).
onPress(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for press events (mouse button down over component).
onPressed(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for pressed state events (continuous while pressed).
onRelease(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for release events (mouse button up after press).
onReleased(Listener) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Registers a listener for released state events (continuous while released).
onRemove() - Method in class microui.layout.LayoutManager
Called when an entry is removed from the container.
onStateChangedListener(Listener) - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Sets a listener to be called when the checkbox state changes.
open() - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Opens the menu.
Orientation - Enum Class in microui.constants
Enumeration representing the two primary layout orientations for UI components.
